name: mfe-playground
description: Micro Frontends monorepo with Native Federation (Angular)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,angular,forms,charts -c blue,red,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w packages/host" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-angular" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-forms" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-charts"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/auth && npm run build -w packages/remote-angular && npm run build -w packages/remote-forms && npm run build -w packages/remote-charts && npm run build -w packages/host
